about.title: We connect people with the right home.
about.subtitle: Hommies is about more than just a home. It's about the people you come home to — and the community you become part of.
about.missionBody: To build Denmark's best platform for housing search and roomie matching — a safe space where you find exactly what you're looking for.
about.value1Body: The best homes are built on real connections between people — not square meters.
about.value2Body: Verified profiles, encrypted messages and digital contracts that protect everyone.
about.value3Body: Find roomies or homes in minutes. We make the complex simple — without cutting quality.
about.storyTitle: Built by people who searched for a home themselves.
about.story1: Hommies started in 2025 from our own experiences. We were a group of friends in the middle of the housing search and felt how draining it could be to find the right place to live — and the right person to live with. Housing platforms felt cold and impersonal, mostly about square meters and prices, not people.
about.story2: We missed a solution that took more than just the home into account. A platform where personality, lifestyle and chemistry actually mattered. So we built Hommies — a platform that makes finding a home and roomies more human, safer and much more effective.
about.story3: In 2026 we officially launched. The ambition is clear: we want to be Denmark's preferred platform for housing and roomie matching. A place where the right match actually makes a difference in everyday life.
about.story4: And we're only just getting started.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your next home?
about.ctaBody: Create a free profile and experience an easier way to find a home.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body1: At Hommies (Danish business reg. CVR 43244590) we take your privacy seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you use our platform (web and mobile apps for Android and iOS).
privacy.s1Body2: Data controller is Hommies, C/O Human Davari, Randbølvej 73, 3. th, 2720 Vanløse, Denmark. By using Hommies you accept this privacy policy. You can always reach us at info@hommies.dk.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect the following types of personal data:
privacy.s2Item1Body: Email, encrypted password and — optional — phone number.
privacy.s2Item2Body: Name, age, gender, occupation/study, nationality, languages, personality traits, lifestyle preferences, short "about me" text, monthly budget and rental period preferences.
privacy.s2Item3Body: Main avatar plus up to 5 additional profile pictures you upload yourself.
privacy.s2Item4Body: Listing title, description, address, postal code, GPS coordinates, rent, deposit, amenities, photos and optional floor plan.
privacy.s2Item5Body: Your saved search criteria (area, price range, filters) and homes you've marked as favorites.
privacy.s2Item6Body: The content of chats you send to other users on the platform.
privacy.s2Item7Body: In our mobile apps you can consent to letting us use your GPS position to find homes near you. You can revoke consent in your phone's settings at any time. We do not store continuous location — it's only used at the moment of searching.
privacy.s2Item8Body: On the web, payments are handled by Stripe. Card details are stored at Stripe — we only receive a transaction ID and a receipt. In our mobile apps, digital purchases are handled by Google Play Billing (Android) or Apple App Store / StoreKit (iOS).
privacy.s2Item9Body: If you allow push notifications, we store the anonymous device token that your phone/browser issues, so we can send messages to you.
privacy.s2Item10Body: IP address, browser type, operating system, app version and device ID. We also receive standard server logs (request timestamp, visited page).
privacy.s3Title: 3. How and why do we use your data?
privacy.s3Intro: We use your information for the following purposes with the following GDPR legal bases:
privacy.s3Item1: Delivering the platform and matching with roomies/homes (contract — GDPR Art. 6(1)(b))
privacy.s3Item2: Messages and communication about your account (contract)
privacy.s3Item3: Processing payments and issuing receipts (contract + legal obligation)
privacy.s3Item4: Security, fraud prevention and abuse detection (legitimate interest — GDPR Art. 6(1)(f))
privacy.s3Item5: Push and email notifications you've opted in to (consent — GDPR Art. 6(1)(a))
privacy.s3Item6: Improving the platform via aggregated usage analytics (legitimate interest)
privacy.s4Title: 4. Who do we share data with?
privacy.s4Intro: We never sell your information. We only share data in the following cases:
privacy.s4Item1Body: Your public profile (name, age, pictures, bio) is visible in Explore and Matches. When you match or accept a request, a chat opens where you can exchange messages.
privacy.s4Item2Label: Data processors (third parties processing data on our behalf):
privacy.s4Item2Body: Supabase (EU — hosting, database and authentication), Vercel (US — web hosting), Stripe (US — payments, web only), Resend (US — transactional emails), Google Play Services (Android push and digital purchases), Apple Inc. (iOS push via APNs and digital purchases via App Store). With all non-EU providers we have Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) in place under GDPR Art. 46.
privacy.s4Item3Body: If required by law, court order, or to protect our or other users' rights.
privacy.s4Outro: We never sell your personal data to third parties or ad networks.
privacy.s5Body: Data is always transmitted encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. Passwords are stored as salted hashes. The database is secured with row-level security so each user only sees their own data. We use secure ISO 27001-certified cloud providers. However, no internet transmission can be guaranteed 100% secure.
privacy.s6Intro: Under GDPR (Art. 15-22) you have the following rights:
privacy.s6Item1Body: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.s6Item2Body: You can correct inaccurate information — most of it you can change yourself in your profile.
privacy.s6Item3Label: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten"):
privacy.s6Item3Body: You can delete your account under Settings → Delete account, or ask us to do it at info@hommies.dk.
privacy.s6Item4Body: You can request to receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON).
privacy.s6Item5Label: Right to object and restrict processing:
privacy.s6Item5Body: You can object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.s6Outro: Email info@hommies.dk to exercise your rights. You also have the right to file a complaint with the Danish Data Protection Agency (Datatilsynet — datatilsynet.dk, Carl Jacobsens Vej 35, 2500 Valby) if you believe we process your data in violation of the rules.
privacy.s7Body: We only use necessary cookies/localStorage to keep you logged in, remember your language choice and prevent brute-force attacks. We do NOT use marketing or tracking cookies. You can always clear your browser's or app's local storage.
privacy.s8Body: Active accounts: data is retained as long as the account exists. Inactive accounts (no login for 36 months): data is anonymized. If you delete your account: profile and messages are deleted within 30 days. Accounting data (receipts, invoices) is retained for 5 years under Danish bookkeeping law §10. Server logs are deleted after 90 days.
privacy.s9Body: Hommies is only for people aged 18 or over. We do not knowingly collect data about children under 18. If you discover that a child has created an account, email info@hommies.dk and we'll delete it.
privacy.s10Body: We update this policy if we change how we process data. Material changes are announced via email or in-app at least 30 days before they take effect.
privacy.s11Body: Questions about this policy or your data? Contact the data controller:

contract.notReady: The house rules aren't ready yet
contract.title: House rules and roomie agreement
contract.signBody: By signing you confirm that you have read and accepted the house rules and roomie agreement. Your digital signature is legally binding under Danish contract law (§ 1).
contract.author: Author
contract.legalNote: These house rules are legally binding under Danish contract law (§ 1). Digital acceptance with a timestamp constitutes a valid signature.
contract.wizardOnlyLandlords: Only landlords can create house rules
contract.wizardSentBody: The tenant can now read and sign
contract.step1Sub: Who lives there, and what's the address?
contract.step2Sub: When should it be quiet, and what are the rules for music and noise?
contract.step2QuietPh: E.g. 22:00–08:00 on weekdays, 23:00–09:00 on weekends and holidays.
contract.step2NoisePh: E.g. Music and TV are kept at a level that doesn't disturb neighbors. Parties are agreed with the other residents in advance.
contract.step3Sub: Distribution of cleaning responsibility and rules for the shared kitchen.
contract.step3CleanPh: E.g. Common areas are cleaned in rotation each week. Your own room is your responsibility. Bathroom is cleaned at least once a week.
contract.step3KitchenPh: E.g. Dishes are washed right away. Food in the fridge is labeled with name and date. The bathroom is left clean.
contract.step4Sub: Rules for overnight guests, pets and smoking.
contract.step4GuestPh: E.g. Overnight guests are welcome for up to 7 nights per month. Longer stays are agreed with the other residents. Guests follow the house rules.
contract.step4PetsPh: E.g. Small dogs and cats are allowed. To be agreed with the other residents in advance.
contract.step5Sub: Add any other agreements or rules not covered above.
contract.step5Ph: E.g. No bikes in the stairwell. Trash is sorted and taken out Wednesday evening. Residents give each other 1 month's notice when moving out.
contract.legalShort: When you click Send for signing, the tenant can open the document in the app and sign digitally. The agreement is legally binding under Danish contract law.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your Hommies account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This page explains how to delete your Hommies account (Danish business reg. CVR 43244590) and what happens to your data.
deleteAccount.h1: Two ways to delete your account
deleteAccount.method1Step1: Log in to Hommies (web or mobile app)
deleteAccount.method1Step2: Open the menu and click Settings
deleteAccount.method1Step3: Choose "Delete account" in the side menu
deleteAccount.method1Note: Your account is removed immediately and you are signed out automatically.
deleteAccount.method2Title: 2. Via email (if you can't log in)
deleteAccount.method2Body: Send an email from the address your Hommies account is registered with to:
deleteAccount.method2Subject: Write "Delete my account" in the subject line. We will confirm deletion within 30 days.
deleteAccount.deletedTitle: The following data is permanently deleted from our systems:
deleteAccount.deletedItem1: Your profile (name, age, gender, occupation, nationality, personality, lifestyle, bio)
deleteAccount.deletedItem2: All profile pictures and uploaded images
deleteAccount.deletedItem3: Listings you've created (title, address, photos, floor plan, rent, deposit, amenities)
deleteAccount.deletedItem4: Messages and chats — both sent and received
deleteAccount.deletedItem7: House rules and roomie agreements you've created
deleteAccount.deletedItem8: Push notification tokens and email preferences
deleteAccount.timeframeBody: Max 30 days. In practice it happens within a few minutes when you delete via the app yourself.
deleteAccount.retainedTitle: A small amount of data we must retain for legal and security reasons:
deleteAccount.retainedItem1Body: Receipts and invoices from Stripe purchases are retained for 5 years under Danish bookkeeping law §10. Anonymized where possible — only transaction ID and amount.
deleteAccount.retainedItem2Body: IP addresses and request times are retained for 90 days for security purposes (fraud prevention, brute-force detection).
deleteAccount.retainedItem3Body: Aggregated numbers (active users, listings count) where you cannot be identified.
deleteAccount.contactBody: Questions about deletion or how we handle your data? Contact:

landing.heroSubtitle: Rooms, roomies and shared apartments across Denmark – all on one platform.
landing.featuredSubtitle: A selection from our active listings across the country.
landing.exploreSubtitle: Pick your city and see what's available right now.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from profile to move-in. Free to get started.
landing.howStep1Body: Tell us a bit about yourself, your interests and what you're looking for. It helps us find the right matches.
landing.howStep2Body: Swipe, like and find people and homes that fit you. We only show what's relevant.
landing.howStep3Body: Reach out directly in the app, arrange viewings and sort out the contract. Safe and easy.
landing.howStep3Chat: "Hi! The room is still available — can we view it on Saturday?"
landing.housingSubtitle: Verified profiles, direct communication and a focus on finding the right match — not just the first one.
landing.housingRoomsTitle: From cozy attic rooms to big shared apartments
landing.housingVerifiedBody: All users are approved before they can contact others.
landing.housingAllDkBody: Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, Aalborg and 50+ other cities.
landing.housingQuote: "Found my roomie in a week. We moved in together a month later — best decision."
landing.housingDirectBody: Message landlords and roomies directly — no waiting.
landing.ctaBody: Create a listing in minutes, receive requests from verified users and rent out with peace of mind.
landing.faqBody: Need an answer? Email us at
landing.faqA1: Create a free profile, browse available rooms or find roomies, and connect with potential matches. You can send requests and start conversations directly on the platform.
landing.faqA2: Yes. It's free to create a profile, browse listings, contact landlords and find roomies. We connect you with the right people with no hidden fees.
landing.faqQ3: How do I find a roomie?
landing.faqA3: Go to Matches and choose 'Roomies' to see profiles. Send a request, and if they accept, you can start a conversation.
landing.faqQ4: How do I contact a landlord?
landing.faqA4: When you find a room you like, you can send a request. If the landlord accepts, a chat opens where you can arrange viewings and details.
landing.faqQ5: How do I create a room listing?
landing.faqA5: Click 'Create listing' in the menu and follow the simple steps. Upload pictures, add details and a price. Your listing goes live immediately.
landing.faqA6: Yes, we review every user before they can contact others, so you can use the platform with peace of mind.
landing.partnerBody: As a Hommies user you get 10% off at Oscars Biludlejning — whether you're renting out or moving in. Easy, fast and at a good price.
